text: REAL, fixed. block_lanczos() registered on.exit(drop A_left) AFTER building A_right (irlba.R); a throw in .amatrix_block_lanczos_right_operator orphaned A_left's resident upload. Fix: hoist the source-drop on.exit to immediately after the source upload. Repro tests/testthat/test-regression-irlba-upload-leak.R (fails before: leaked key, resident_drop=0; passes after).
